title: After the Arima Kinen: My Miracle

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Why does Sweep always have to win?! She
snatched the win from right under me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Geez... Even she's gone all heart-eyes for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I can admit that you got everyone
way more excited than I did today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So thanks, Sweep. That was a fun race.
